member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions
member.summary: Contains all the Actions to be able to Have listeners happen under certain conditions

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onModStringRecieved
member.summary: Runs when Mod String is received from another player

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onModStringReceived
member.summary: Runs when Mod String is received from another player

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onMyModsGathered
member.summary: Runs when clients Mods are stored

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onMapInitialized
member.summary: Runs when Map Changed and Map GameObjects are Stored

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onPlayerSpawned
member.summary: Runs when a player spawns (supplies player that spawned)

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onMatchStarted
member.summary: Runs when a Matchmaking Match begins

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onMatchEnded
member.summary: Runs when a Matchmaking Match ends

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onRoundStarted
member.summary: Runs when a Matchmaking Round begins

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onRoundEnded
member.summary: Runs when a Matchmaking Round ends

member.name: E:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Actions.onPlayerHealthChanged
member.summary: Runs when a players health changes (supplies the player and amount)

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles
member.summary: Unsed to Load AssetBundles

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetBundleGameObjectFromFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a GameObject that is loaded from an AssetBundle File

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetBundleFromFile(System.String)
member.summary: Returns The AssetBundle that is loaded from an AssetBundle File (please remember to .Unload() the bundle)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetFromFile``1(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns an Asset of a specified type that is loaded from an AssetBundle File

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAllOfTypeFromFile``1(System.String)
member.summary: Returns all assets from a specified AssetBundle File

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetBundleFromStream(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns an AssetBundle from a stream (Embedded Resource) (please remember to .Unload() the bundle)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetBundleFromStream(MelonLoader.MelonMod,System.String)
member.summary: Returns an AssetBundle from a stream (Embedded Resource) (please remember to .Unload() the bundle)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetFromStream``1(MelonLoader.MelonMod,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns as Asset from a stream (embedded resource)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAllOfTypeFromStream``1(MelonLoader.MelonMod,System.String)
member.summary: Returns a list of Assets of a specified type from a stream (Enbedded Resource)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AssetBundles.LoadAssetFromStream``1(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Returns an Asset a stream (Enbedded Resource)

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AudioManager
member.summary: Audio Manager to Create AudioCalls

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AudioManager.LoadWavFile(System.String)
member.summary: CreateAudioCalls Triggers this but leaving this visible for others if they want it

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AudioManager.PlaySound(Il2CppRUMBLE.Audio.AudioCall,UnityEngine.Vector3,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Plays a specified AudioCall at a Position

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AudioManager.CreateAudioCall(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates an AudioCall and sets the clip to the file. Must be wav file. Sets the AudioCall/clip HideFlags to HideAndDontSave

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.AudioManager.CreateAudioCalls(System.String[],System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a list of AudioCalls and sets the clips to the files. Must be wav files. Sets the AudioCalls/clips HideFlags to HideAndDontSave

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls
member.summary: Contains Methods to get info about different stuff

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.IsInitialized
member.summary: Returns true/false on if the API is Initialized

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.IsMapInitialized
member.summary: Returns true/false on if the Map Objects have been stored

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Matchmaking
member.summary: Be able to retrieve Matchmaking specific info

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Matchmaking.getMatchmakingTypeAsString
member.summary: Returns a string readout of what Matchmaking Queue type is selected

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Matchmaking.getMatchmakingTypeAsInt
member.summary: Returns an int readout of what Matchmaking Queue type is selected

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods
member.summary: Be able to retrieve Mod specific info

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.getMyModString
member.summary: Returns the Mod list as a string

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.getOpponentModString
member.summary: (Use only in a Match) Returns the opponents Mod list as a string

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.getMyMods
member.summary: Returns the Mod list as a custom class

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.getOpponentMods
member.summary: (Use only in a Match) Returns the opponents Mod list as a custom class

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.doesOpponentHaveMod(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: (Use only in a Match) Returns true/false on if the opponent's mod contains a mod matching the supplied info

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Mods.findOwnMod(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns true/false on if a your mods contains a mod matching the supplied info

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap
member.summary: Be able to retrieve Controller Input Values

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController
member.summary: Contains Right Controller Values

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetTrigger
member.summary: Returns a float of the Right Controller Trigger Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetGrip
member.summary: Returns a float of the Right Controller Grip Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetPrimary
member.summary: Returns a float of the Right Controller Primary Button Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetSecondary
member.summary: Returns a float of the Right Controller Secondary Button Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetJoystick
member.summary: Returns a Vector2 of the Right Controller Joystick Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.RightController.GetJoystickClick
member.summary: Returns a float of the Right Controller Joystick Click Value

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController
member.summary: Contains Left Controller Values

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetTrigger
member.summary: Returns a float of the Left Controller Trigger Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetGrip
member.summary: Returns a float of the Left Controller Grip Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetPrimary
member.summary: Returns a float of the Left Controller Primary Button Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetSecondary
member.summary: Returns a float of the Left Controller Secondary Button Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetJoystick
member.summary: Returns a Vector2 of the Left Controller Joystick Value

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.ControllerMap.LeftController.GetJoystickClick
member.summary: Returns a float of the Left Controller Joystick Click Value

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Scene
member.summary: Be able to retrieve Scene specific info

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Scene.GetSceneName
member.summary: Returns current scene name

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Scene.GetLastSceneName
member.summary: Returns last scene name

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players
member.summary: Be able to retrieve Player specific info

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.IsHost
member.summary: Returns true/false if the player is Hist of the lobby (returns false if not in a Photon Lobby)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetAllPlayers
member.summary: honestly just use PlayerManager.instance.AllPlayers

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetLocalPlayer
member.summary: honestly just use PlayerManager.instance.localPlayer

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetLocalPlayerController
member.summary: honestly just use PlayerManager.instance.localPlayer.Controller

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetEnemyPlayers
member.summary: returns a list of only other people (in PlayerManager.instance.AllPlayers order)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetClosestPlayer(UnityEngine.Vector3,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns the Closest Player to a specified position (able to ignore local user)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetClosestPlayer(UnityEngine.Vector3,Il2CppRUMBLE.Players.PlayerController)
member.summary: Returns the Closest Player to a specified position while ignoring a spicific player

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetPlayerByControllerType(Il2CppRUMBLE.Players.ControllerType)
member.summary: Returns the Player to a specified by a controller type. (just use PlayerManager.instance.GetPlayer(controllerType))

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetPlayerByActorNo(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the Player with a specified Actor Number

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Calls.Players.GetPlayersInActorNoOrder
member.summary: Returns a List of Players in order of Actor Number (oldest to youngest in the room)

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewText
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Text GameObject

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewText(System.String,System.Single,UnityEngine.Color,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Text GameObject with the specified Text, size, color, position, and rotation

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewButton
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Button

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewButton(UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Button at the Specified Position/Rotation

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewButton(System.Action)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Button with a Listener of the supplied Action

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Create.NewButton(UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion,System.Action)
member.summary: Creates and returns a new Button at the Specified Position/Rotation with a Listener of the supplied Action

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in Rumble Maps

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects.DDOL
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in DontDestroyOnLoad

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects.Gym
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in Gym Map

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects.Map0
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in Map0/Ring Map

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects.Map1
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in Map1/Pit Map

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.GameObjects.Park
member.summary: Contains access to almost every GameObject in Park Map

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Utilities.RumbleMod
member.summary: this is a MelonMod but with a built in RaiseEvent manager

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.Utilities.ControllerInputPoller
member.summary: an extention to RMAPI's input manager that does a lot of the work for you

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RMAPI.PhotonRPCs.PunRPC
member.summary: add this attribute to a method inside of a MonoBehaviourPun component to use Photon's RPCs

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.Lock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Locks all lighting settings so they cannot be changed by other mods. If a mod attempts to unlock lighting with a lower lock priority, it will be ignored.
member.param: Use reasonable judgement when setting lock priority, your mod isn't the main character, and you likely don't need it.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.Unlock(System.Int32)
member.summary: Attempts to unlock lighting settings so they can be changed again. If a mod attempts to unlock lighting with a lower lock priority, it will be ignored.
member.param: Use reasonable judgement when unlocking settings. your mod isn't the main character, and if someone's locked with high priority, it should probably stay that way.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.OnSceneWasLoaded
member.summary: Reloads lighting settings on scene load, since RenderSettings is a per-scene object.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.UseBounceLighting(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the current scene's lighting mode. Node: RUMBLE's Loader scene uses trilight by default.
member.param: If true, sets lighting mode to Trilight. If false, sets it back to skybox.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.SetSkyLightColor(System.Nullable{UnityEngine.Color})
member.summary: Sets the color of the light applied to the top of all dynamically lit surfaces in the scene.
member.param: The color to set. Leave null for default settings.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.SetHorizonLightColor(System.Nullable{UnityEngine.Color})
member.summary: Sets the color of the light applied to the sides of all dynamically lit surfaces in the scene.
member.param: The color to set. Leave null for default settings.

member.name: M:RumbleModdingAPI.Lighting.SetGroundLightColor(System.Nullable{UnityEngine.Color})
member.summary: Sets the color of the light applied to the bottom of all dynamically lit surfaces in the scene.
member.param: The color to set. Leave null for default settings.

member.name: T:RumbleModdingAPI.RumbleModdingAPI
member.summary: MelonMod Class
